title: dactylis glomerata f. ciliata
intro: Dactylis glomerata f. ciliata, also known as orchard grass, is a subspecies of the perennial grass Dactylis glomerata, commonly used in herbal medicine. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Dactylis glomerata f. ciliata include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and act as an antiseptic agent, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of this plant may be consumed as tea, taken as a tincture, or applied topically as an infusion to reap its medicinal benefits.
